headline: Oil Could Drop Fast If the Iran Talks Succeed. Here's How to Hedge Your Energy Portfolio.
summary: Iran and the United States continue to trade ceasefire proposals, and a deal could quickly shift the oil market narrative.

headline: Cramer Flags AI Winners, Warns STMicro Is 'Late Late Late' At 51x Earnings

headline: Jefferies Sees Multiple Catalysts Driving Devon Energy (DVN) Higher after Coterra Deal
summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is included among the 10 Best Long Term Low Risk Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On May 8, Jefferies upgraded Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) to Buy from Hold. It raised its price target on the stock to $62 from $53. The firm said pullbacks in the front end of […]

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Devon Energy, Raises Price Target to $65
summary: Citigroup  analyst Scott Gruber   maintains Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) with a Buy and raises the price target from $60 to $65.
